# Persona Responsibility Checklist (template)

Use this checklist in project kickoffs to ensure required personas are identified and responsibilities assigned.

- [ ] Project Name:
- [ ] Program Owner: (name / contact) — responsibilities acknowledged
- [ ] Project Manager (PM): (name / contact)
- [ ] Product Manager (PdM): (name / contact)
- [ ] Technical Lead: (name / contact)
- [ ] Developers: (names / teams)
- [ ] QA / Testing: (name / team)
- [ ] UX Researcher / Designer: (name / contact)
- [ ] Security Engineer: (name / contact)
- [ ] Release Engineer / SRE: (name / contact)
- [ ] Data Analyst: (name / contact)
- [ ] Stakeholder / Sponsor: (name / contact)

Acceptance & handoff notes:
- Acceptance criteria owner: (PdM)
- Deployment owner: (Release Engineer)
- Post-release measurement owner: (Data Analyst)
- Security sign-off required: (yes/no) — if yes, who?

Notes:
- If a role is shared across projects, indicate level of support and SLAs (e.g., "Security reviews within 3 business days").
